sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78388" key="paramarturi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραμαρτῠρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, as law-term, <sense id="n78388.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παραγραφή</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.57</biblScope> </bibl> (v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
